title: Synthwave PvP 256x
description: Synthwave 256x Purple pvp resource pack on 1.8.9-1.16
body:
## **⚡ Synthwave PvP Pack [256x]** 🌌

Transform your game with a vibrant neon aesthetic! This pack keeps your blocks classic while overhauling everything else for a high-definition competitive experience. ⚔️

### **Highlights:**
* **🌈 Neon Visuals:** Bright, high-definition colors that breathe new life into your world without the clutter.
* **🗡️ Gear & UI:** Significant updates to **weapons, tools, and items** plus a fully customized GUI.
* **☁️ Epic Sky:** A complete overhaul of the skybox for a totally unique atmosphere.
* **🚀 FPS Friendly:** Since block textures remain mostly vanilla, you get **256x detail** on items without a huge performance hit.

---
